title: VilleMatica
description: Adds Custom Villages, Mobs, Items, and Really Anything Necessary for Vanilla!
body:
DISCLAIMER: MOST OF THESE FEATURES HAVE NOT BEEN RELEASED YET. MANY OF THESE FEATURES ARE STILL BEING WORKED ON AND WILL BE RELEASED LATER IN FUTURE UPDATES. FEATURES MARKED WITH "*" HAVE BEEN ADDED, AND FEATURES MARKED WITH "**" HAVE YET TO BE ADDED.

Adds new villages, mobs, items, and weapons! Adds long-needed features that have yet to be added ever since 1.14 by Mojang!

This Mod adds many different things. It adds new **villages such as jungle villages, mushroom island villages, nether villages, end villages, mountain villages, sky villages, etc. It also adds new mobs such as the **Endologer. The mod also adds new items and tools that can be modified greatly by different elements, biomes, and dimensions. For example, **the Nether makes items "Singed" when combined with *nether amulets. This changes their durability, and slightly increases their damage and enchantment rate. The End makes items "Cursed". This makes items do much more damage, but have less durability and enchantment levels. There are many more ways items get modified by biomes. Not only this, but the mod adds **new structures that add to the ambience. There are many **new structures, **modified versions of vanilla ones, and many more. The structures have new mobs inside that drop good loot. Aside from all of this, there is **lore. This lore can be found throughout the mod in the different structures through books, the abandoned versions of them through signs, and many, many more things. VilleMatica also adds new **villagers with new professions. It makes your time at villages worthwhile. It also gives new loot to village chests. 
(**: Will be added in the future.
 *: Has already been added, possible for new updates to roll out for that specific features.)

VilleMatica adds so many more things that need to be in Vanilla Minecraft. These things always make the game more fun!
